riskClasses: public API or external contract changes
why: Adds nullable users.address + users.onboarded_at columns (migration 0002) and exposes birthday/address/onboardedAt as writable better-auth additionalFields (input:true, self-data only; role stays input:false). Touches auth identity payload, a DB migration, and the better-auth API contract consumed by the mobile client. Manual-first evidence required before finalize.
